path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(19, 19, 19)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(19, 19, 19));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 418px; height: 1px; padding-top: 90px; margin-left: 1521px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Analysis Plan:
Utilize "Olist" customer and order records to detect traits of customers, orders, sellers, or products that show signs of a higher quantity of items purchased per order, eventually proposing a solution to increase said metric so that annual revenue will increase by at least 10% from a baseline

text.tspan: Utilize "Olist" customer and order records to detect traits of customers, orders,
sellers, or products that show signs of a higher quantity of items purchased
per order, eventually proposing a solution to increase said metric so that
annual revenue will increase by at least 10% from a baseline

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(19, 19, 19)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(19, 19, 19));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(5, 5, 5)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(5, 5, 5));
